title: cacalia tangutica
intro: Cacalia tangutica, also known as Chinese button plant, is a perennial plant species native to China and Mongolia, characterized by its unique button-like flowers and edible leaves. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cacalia tangutica include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various health conditions. Cacalia tangutica is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be consumed raw in salads or used as a garnish.
